content:
THE FORCE
force = energy field created by life and binding the galaxy
force-sensitive = individual able to perceive or influence the force
living force = immediate force generated by living beings
cosmic force = enduring aspect connecting life, death, and galactic destiny
light side = balance, compassion, discipline, selflessness
dark side = fear, anger, hatred, domination, corruption
common abilities = heightened awareness, precognition, telekinesis, persuasion, sensing life
force vision = symbolic or incomplete perception, not guaranteed literal prophecy
force ghost = preserved identity after death through exceptional spiritual knowledge
midichlorians = microscopic life forms enabling communication with the force

name: the force
keywordsRaw: the force, force metaphysics, living force, cosmic force

access = not a routine travel method
